headline: Assessing DoorDash (DASH) Valuation After Recent Mixed Share Price Performance
summary: DoorDash stock after recent performance DoorDash (DASH) has been on a mixed run, with the share price up about 3% over the past week but showing a decline over the past month and past 3 months. See our latest analysis for DoorDash. At a share price of $160.69, DoorDash has seen short term momentum pick up with a 1 day share price return of 3.07% and a 7 day share price return of 6.77%. This follows a 30 day share price return decline of 9.00% and a 90 day share price return decline of 28.30%...

headline: Is DoorDash (DASH) Attractive After Recent Share Price Pullback And Conflicting Valuation Signals
summary: Wondering if DoorDash at around US$160 a share is priced for its future or already reflecting a lot of optimism? This article breaks down what that might mean for you as an investor. The stock recently closed at US$160.69, with a 6.8% gain over the last 7 days, a 9.0% decline over 30 days, a 26.9% decline year to date, and a 14.8% decline over 1 year. The 3 year return sits at 167.4% and the 5 year return at 11.9%. These moves are unfolding against a backdrop of ongoing interest in food...

headline: DoorDash to Announce First Quarter 2026 Results on May 6, 2026
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, April 09, 2026--DoorDash, Inc. (NASDAQ: DASH) today announced that the company’s first quarter 2026 financial results will be released after the U.S. financial markets close on Wednesday, May 6, 2026. The company’s earnings press release will be made available on the DoorDash Investor Relations website at ir.doordash.com.
